invalidation.zh: 价格跌破2850（基于ATR 69.00和支撑）或资金费率Z-Score升至20%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则平仓。
invalidation.en: Close position if price breaks below 2850 (based on ATR 69.00 and support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 20% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 价格跌破120（基于ATR 2.49和支撑）或资金费率Z-Score升至100%以上（显示过度看涨），则平仓。
invalidation.en: Close position if price breaks below 120 (based on ATR 2.49 and support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 100% (indicating excessive bullishness).
